Platform

Built for the clinic,
not the spreadsheet

See all features →
⊕

Structured Signa

Dosage, frequency, duration, and route captured with clinical-grade affordances. Zero ambiguity in every directive.

◻

PDF + Signature

Generate downloadable prescriptions with physician metadata, digital signing, and tamper-evident output.

⊞

Airtable Profiles

Server-side physician credentials with rate-limit aware retries and automatic refresh.

◈

DPA-Minded Defaults

Patient identifiers minimized in audit payloads. Compliant by default, extensible by policy.

Compliance & Security

End-to-end encrypted

Patient data encrypted in transit and at rest with AES-256.

Full audit trail

Every action timestamped, attributed, and exportable for regulatory review.

Role-based access

Physicians, nurses, and admins get exactly the access their role requires.
